name: Document Intake
description: OCR, extraction, and document classification surfaces for local intake workflows.
starter_prompt: Help me extract the key fields from this document and tell me if anything needs manual review
guide_steps: Use the OCR route or image intake surface to process the file locally.
Pick the closest schema or preset before extracting structured fields.
Check the confidence and escalation notes before acting on the result.
quick_actions: run ocr.extract -- action run mode auto image_paths [...]
Open the speech or Telegram image route for intake
